description.zh: 课题组自主开发的 AI 服务平台，面向高校师生提供国内直连的 GPT-5、Claude、DeepSeek 等 15+ 顶尖 AI 模型。支持论文写作、文献翻译、代码调试、数据分析等科研场景，按量计费，最低 ¥1 起充。
description.en: An AI service platform developed by our lab for university faculty and students. Provides direct access to 15+ top AI models including GPT-5, Claude, and DeepSeek. Supports research tasks such as paper writing, literature translation, code debugging, and data analysis. Pay-per-use pricing starting from ¥1.

features.en: Direct access in China, no VPN needed

description.zh: 课题组编写的数字化课程教材，托管于 GitHub Pages，内容持续更新。
description.en: Digital course textbooks authored by our lab, hosted on GitHub Pages with continuous updates.

title.zh: 《数据采集与预处理》2027 春季学期

description.zh: 教授数据驱动的可重复性研究方法，涵盖 R、Python 等工具的实践操作，强调动手能力和项目导向。
description.en: Teaching data-driven reproducible research methods, covering hands-on practice with R, Python, and other tools, emphasizing practical skills and project-based learning.

description.zh: 课题组日常科研中使用的工具和平台，推荐给组内学生和同行参考。
description.en: Tools and platforms used in our daily research, recommended for lab members and peers.

description.zh: 免费开源的文献管理工具，支持浏览器一键导入和多设备同步
description.en: Free and open-source reference manager with browser import and multi-device sync

description.zh: 统计分析和数据可视化的首选工具，生态学研究必备
description.en: Primary tool for statistical analysis and data visualization, essential for ecology research

description.zh: 通用编程语言，适用于数据处理、机器学习和自动化脚本
description.en: General-purpose language for data processing, machine learning, and automation

description.zh: 云端地理空间分析平台，提供海量卫星影像数据和计算资源
description.en: Cloud-based geospatial analysis platform with massive satellite imagery and computing resources

description.zh: 在线 LaTeX 编辑器，支持多人协作，主流期刊模板齐全
description.en: Online LaTeX editor with real-time collaboration and templates for major journals

description.zh: 代码和文档版本管理工具，科研项目协作必备
description.en: Version control for code and documents, essential for research collaboration
